label: Build and maintain the public surfaces for the work — Twitter, community, LinkedIn, YouTube
to: the public / future collaborators / future partners
why: The framework is not fully alive until it has a public surface. Right now everything is brilliant and invisible. The public surface is what turns invisible work into compounding work. This is a cadence commitment — ship on the surfaces in order, not all at once.

build_order: Twitter — resurrect the dormant 1,400-follower account. Lowest friction, fastest win.
Community scouting — find where big-ideas builders who are actually shipping congregate. Discords / subreddits / founder forums / research-adjacent. Currently 'needs scouting' — not decided.
LinkedIn — build before the partnership gets serious, not after. Essentially zero presence today.
YouTube — build from zero. Highest bandwidth for showing what Mission Control / Secretary / the framework actually does. Do it once the other three are flowing.
operational_shape.feed_loop: daily_content_journal is the reservoir. Entries get pulled by platform_intent tag when a surface is ready to publish.

notes: Declared 2026-04-22 in Jake's scope riff. Comparator hint: public_surface_development. Medium weight (0.65) — important but should not outrank core build work on any given day.
